content.claim: Specialist assessment activity in pedagógiai szakszolgálat (educational counseling services) is increasingly consumed by BTMN/SNI expert-committee evaluations, crowding out direct therapeutic and remedial care time
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: Sources are journalistic/advocacy-based rather than administrative capacity statistics
No quantitative time-allocation data provided (e.g., percentage of FTE devoted to assessment versus therapy)
Causal attribution to rising identification volume is stated but not rigorously separated from other workforce pressures (wages, training, job conditions)
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
